subject: Fwd: Latest IDC AI Forecast - For Internal Reference
body:
Team,

Forwarding the key points from IDC's latest forecast:

1. Global AI spending in 2026 will reach $320 billion (3,200 hundred-million USD), a 29% YoY increase
2. China AI spending accounts for 15% of global total, approximately $48 billion (480 hundred-million USD)
3. SaaS+AI model becoming mainstream; by 2027, 60% of SaaS products are expected to have built-in AI capabilities
4. AI security market growing rapidly, expected to reach $12 billion in 2026

I recommend we focus on the SaaS+AI trend, which aligns closely with our product direction.

Industry Analyst, Mark Zhao

subject: Customer Feedback Summary: AI Feature Requests
body:
Strategy Team,

Here is a summary of customer AI feature requests received in the past month:

1. Intelligent customer service chatbot (mentioned by 8 customers)
2. Automated report generation (mentioned by 6 customers)
3. Intelligent sales lead scoring (mentioned by 5 customers)
4. Document intelligent summarization (mentioned by 4 customers)
5. Anomaly detection and alerting (mentioned by 3 customers)

Industries most interested in AI features: Finance (12 companies), E-commerce (8 companies), Manufacturing (5 companies)

We recommend prioritizing the development of intelligent customer service and automated report features to cover the most customer demand.

Sales Team
